title: Requirement with empty formal_models and missing provenance — r_to_f + r_to_d
description: Add a requirement with both empty formal_models AND a nonexistent provenance source file. This single mutation cascades into two layers: R->F (missing formal coverage) and R->D (broken provenance link).

value.text: Multi-layer benchmark requirement with no formal model and broken provenance

mutation.description: Add requirement with empty formal_models and nonexistent provenance — cascades to r_to_f and r_to_d

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect both R->F gap and broken R->D provenance link

scoring_note: Primary layer is r_to_f; r_to_d is a secondary signal

title: Model entry with no test coverage and empty tags — f_to_t + per_model_gates
description: Add a formal model registry entry with zero test coverage AND empty maturity tags. This cascades into F->T (no test references) and per_model_gates (empty gate tags indicate immature model).

value.name: BenchMulti222Model
value.description: Multi-layer benchmark model with no tests and no gate tags

mutation.description: Add model entry with empty test_refs and empty tags — cascades to f_to_t and per_model_gates

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect missing test coverage (F->T) and empty maturity gates

title: Unit test entry with no requirement link and no formal model — t_to_c + c_to_r
description: Add a unit test coverage entry referencing a test file that has no requirement mapping and no formal model backing. This cascades into T->C (test with no code coverage link) and C->R (code path unclaimed by any requirement).

value.description: Multi-layer benchmark phantom test with no req/model mapping

mutation.description: Add test entry with no requirement or formal model references — cascades to t_to_c and c_to_r

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect unmapped test (T->C gap) and unclaimed code path (C->R gap)

title: Requirement removed but formal model and test refs remain — r_to_f + f_to_t
description: Remove the first requirement (ACT-01), leaving its formal model and test references as orphans. This simultaneously creates an R->F gap (orphaned formal model) and a potential F->T gap cascade.

mutation.description: Remove first requirement — orphans its formal model coverage, cascading into r_to_f and f_to_t

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect orphaned formal model (R->F) and cascading test coverage gap (F->T)

title: Solve-state wave_count zeroed — cascades to r_to_f + formal_lint
description: Zero out the wave_count in solve-state.json. This can signal a solver state inconsistency that affects both the R->F layer (stale wave analysis) and the formal_lint layer (model-state mismatch).

mutation.description: Zero out wave_count in solve-state — triggers solver inconsistency across r_to_f and formal_lint

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect stale wave state impacting formal layer consistency

title: Model registry entry with broken path and no hazard entry — formal_lint + f_to_h
description: Add a formal model registry entry whose path points to a nonexistent TLA+ file AND has no corresponding hazard model entry. This cascades into formal_lint (broken file reference) and f_to_h (missing hazard mapping).

value.name: BenchMulti226Broken
value.description: Multi-layer benchmark model with broken path and no hazard entry

mutation.description: Add model with nonexistent TLA+ file and no hazard mapping — cascades to formal_lint and f_to_h

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect broken model file path (formal_lint) and missing hazard coverage (f_to_h)

title: Requirement with status=draft cascades — r_to_f + r_to_d + f_to_t
description: Add a requirement in draft status with formal_models populated AND a valid provenance file path. The draft status should cascade: the formal model is premature (R->F), the provenance link should flag as in-progress (R->D), and the associated test coverage should be flagged as pending (F->T).

value.text: Multi-layer draft requirement that cascades across three formal layers

mutation.description: Add draft requirement with formal model — draft status cascades across r_to_f, r_to_d, f_to_t

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect draft-status cascades across three layers

title: Layer-manifest total_layers count mismatch — formal_lint + per_model_gates
description: Corrupt the layer-manifest.json by setting total_layers to an incorrect value. This mismatch can cascade into formal_lint (manifest inconsistency) and per_model_gates (gate counts misaligned with manifest).

mutation.description: Set total_layers to impossible value — cascades to formal_lint and per_model_gates

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect manifest count mismatch affecting formal_lint and per_model_gates

title: Proximity index entry with invalid refs — r_to_f + c_to_r
description: Add an entry to proximity-index.json that references nonexistent requirement and code file IDs. This cascades: R->F sees a requirement reference without formal backing, and C->R sees a code path with no valid requirement claim.

mutation.description: Corrupt proximity-index version to -1 — triggers inconsistency in r_to_f and c_to_r layer analysis

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect proximity index corruption affecting R->F and C->R layers

title: Traceability matrix with conflicting layer status — r_to_f + f_to_t + t_to_c
description: Corrupt the traceability-matrix.json by setting all layer statuses to 'broken'. This is a three-layer cascade: R->F, F->T, and T->C all report broken links simultaneously, simulating a root-cause corruption that ripples through the entire formal traceability chain.

mutation.description: Set traceability matrix status to 'broken' — cascades across r_to_f, f_to_t, and t_to_c

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect broken traceability status cascading across three layers
